query:
SELECT
            dc.id,
            dc.user_a,
            dc.user_b,
            dc.created_at,
            (SELECT MAX(dm.created_at) FROM dm_messages dm WHERE dm.dm_channel_id = dc.id)
                AS last_message_at
         FROM dm_channels dc
         WHERE dc.user_a = $1 OR dc.user_b = $1
         ORDER BY COALESCE(
            (SELECT MAX(dm.created_at) FROM dm_messages dm WHERE dm.dm_channel_id = dc.id),
            dc.created_at
         ) DESC
